body: This PR prints the simulated years per day to the log. Can someone verify my sypd formula / computations is correct?
title: Log simulated years per day
Remove type piracy, fix aqua test

body:
This PR changes the printing of the n-inference failures dict to not truncate printing the dict, which happens in the log at the moment:

```
┌ Info: n-jet failures (excluding n=0)
│   nfailures =
│    Dict{Any, Any} with 13 entries:
│      "implicit_tendency!"             => 674
│      "hyperdiffusion_tendency!"       => 642
│      "additional_tendency!"           => 15
│      "update_surface_conditions!"     => 598
│      "fill_with_nans!"                => 3
│      "limited_tendency!"              => 649
│      "horizontal_advection_tendency!" => 584
└      ⋮                                => ⋮
```
The dict is 16 entries long, so it shouldn't bloat the log too much.
title: Print full n-inference failures dict

body: This PR lowers the inference failure limit test
title: Lower inference failure limit

body:
cc @simonbyrne @sriharshakandala 
A simple example consisting of a negatively buoyant thermal bubble in a 3D box that may be used for GPU integration tests. Timestepper (explicit) used is SSP33ShuOsher. Default buildkite outputs include mid-plane slices along the y-coordinate. 

Closes #1784.
title: Port DC problem to ClimaAtmos
